import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    mut skipping = true
    while skipping
      if i >= n
        skipping = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
                when Some(v)
                  v
                when None
                  0
                end
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
          i = i + 1
        else
          skipping = false
        end
      end
    end
    if i < n
      mut sign = 1
      let first = match string.byte_at(s, i)
                  when Some(v)
                    v
                  when None
                    0
                  end
      if first == 45
        sign = 0 - 1
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut reading = true
      while reading
        if i >= n
          reading = false
        else
          let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
                  when Some(v)
                    v
                  when None
                    0
                  end
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            reading = false
          end
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, val * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
              when Some(s)
                s
              when None
                ""
              end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
              when Some(s)
                s
              when None
                ""
              end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
               when Some(v)
                 v
               when None
                 0
               end

  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len()
  mut found = 0 - 1
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if lo >= hi
      done = true
    else
      let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
      let v = match nums.get(mid)
              when Some(x)
                x
              when None
                0
              end
      if v == target
        found = mid
        done = true
      else if v < target
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid
      end
    end
  end

  if found >= 0
    print("index=#{found}")
  else
    print("not_found")
  end
end
